name: 𝖥𝗎𝗋𝗋𝗒 𝖢𝗈𝗇𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇 𝖣𝗂𝗌𝖺𝗌𝗍𝖾𝗋
description:
Version 1.0

During the second night of FURWAVE 2037, an experimental airborne agent is released through the convention’s air filtration system. Attendees begin to literally transform into their fursonas or fursuits starting with those wearing the high-end BioNova skins. Panic ensues. Authorities lock down the center. What will you do?

Constructive criticism is encouraged, so if you don't mind please leave truthful reviews.
creator: Alice_steele
